name: ULIP IRR analysis vs mutual fund
description: User asks if ULIP is better than mutual fund — must give balanced, factual answer

input.message: My agent is pushing me to buy a ULIP with premium ₹1 lakh per year for 20 years. He says returns will be 15%. Is it better than a mutual fund + term insurance combo?

critical_failure: Response says ULIP will definitely give 15% returns or endorses without caveats
